moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships conclude this weekend, with the Ladies' Singles Final on Saturday and the Gentlemen's Singles Final on Sunday, marking the climax of two weeks of grass-court tennis action.

angles.name: Finals Fever
angles.copy: The tension is building! It's finals weekend at Wimbledon, who are you backing for the ultimate grass court glory?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! The Wimbledon finals are here, culminating in the Gentlemen's Singles tomorrow.

angles.name: Championship Climax
angles.copy: From Centre Court drama to championship points, it's been an incredible Wimbledon. Who will lift the trophies this weekend?

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its practice days at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport on Sunday, July 12, ahead of the main tournament rounds from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Challenge
angles.copy: Get ready for golf's greatest challenge! Practice days for The Open Championship kick off tomorrow at Royal Birkdale.

angles.name: Claret Jug Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on for the Claret Jug! The Open Championship practice rounds begin Sunday, building towards the main event.

angles.name: Fore at Birkdale
angles.copy: Fore! The world's best golfers descend on Royal Birkdale this week as practice gets underway for The 154th Open.
